KeysToEntries.EnterDedicatedServerIp.Title: Enter IP
KeysToEntries.EnterDedicatedServerIp.Body: Use this option if you fail to connect to a locally hosted dedicated server. If the dedicated server is running on the same computer as the game, please enter 127.0.0.1. Otherwise, find the IP address of your dedicated server, such as 192.168.0.1. If you altered the Dedicated Server port, your IP address will need to be followed :12345, where 12345 is the selected port. For instance, 192.168.0.10:12345.
